heading: Biannual meetings of representatives of all Commissions
label: 15705 Biannual meetings of representatives of all Commissions
notes: Codificationand enacted identical sections. was repealed by .Pub. L. 110–234Pub. L. 110–246Pub. L. 110–234section 4(a) of Pub. L. 110–246
Effective DateSection effective on the first day of the first fiscal year beginning after , see , set out as a note under .June 18, 2008section 14217(d) of Pub. L. 110–246section 15101 of this title

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: Representatives of each Commission, the Appalachian Regional Commission, and the Denali Commission shall meet biannually to discuss issues confronting regions suffering from chronic and contiguous distress and successful strategies for promoting regional development.

children.heading: .—Chair of Meetings
children.label: b .—Chair of Meetings
children.text: The chair of each meeting shall rotate among the Commissions, with the Appalachian Regional Commission to host the first meeting.
